name: cost-aware-router
tagline: OpenAI-compatible proxy that routes simple requests to local Ollama, complex ones to cloud — ~44% savings on a public benchmark.

name: memorystore
tagline: Self-hosted MCP-native memory backend for AI assistants. SQLite + sqlite-vec, Ollama embeddings, zero external network calls — 86% top-1 recall on a 50-question benchmark.

name: context-portability
tagline: Move your AI memory between models. CLI converts ChatGPT exports to a portable format (spec in repo) + memorystore-ready JSONL. 100% fidelity on a 30-sample benchmark, zero external calls.

name: format-survives-upgrades
tagline: AI memory format versioning + migration. PMF v0.1 → v0.2 in one command. Vendor-neutral spec for how AI memory formats should version, with a reference CLI. 100% migration fidelity on 30 samples, zero external calls.

name: tool-revshare
tagline: Revenue-share protocol for AI tool/skill creators. Vendor-neutral spec for marketplaces — manifest format + HMAC-signed reports + payout calculation. 100% verification + payout fidelity on 30 samples, zero external calls.
